description: The human-verdict path for a settlement that EXCEEDS delegated authority. You only open this record after meridian-authority-band-v1 returned FAILED (over-band) or a fraud/SIU/injury flag forces human review. AI recommends; a human supervisor renders the verdict. There is no agent-asserted `withinBand` boolean here on purpose — band membership was already decided by the engine on the band-check record (referenced by authorityBandCheckRef). Because reaching this type means the amount is over-band, an overrideJustification is unconditionally required. | Separation of duties: the accept/reject verdict MUST be rendered by a SEPARATE principal identity (the human supervisor agent key), NOT the performer agent that submitted the recommendation. One agent that both recommends and renders the verdict self-attests the gate and defeats the control.

authorityBandCheckRef.description: recordId of the FAILED meridian-authority-band-v1 check that routed this settlement to a human.

exposureId.description: Optional exposure discriminator. One accident can have multiple exposures (e.g. own-vehicle collision + third-party property + bodily injury); set the same exposureId across the coverage/damage/authority/settlement records of one exposure so N exposures coexist under one claimNumber.

appealOfRef.description: Optional. recordId of the original settlement-outcome being appealed; recording the appeal as a fresh human re-determination that supersedes the original (the original chain stays intact).
